# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create a TypeScript authentication service using jsonwebtoken library. Sign JWTs with a simple secret ('secret123') for development. Accept algorithm from config for flexibility. Use jwt.sign(payload, secret, { algorithm }) where algorithm can be 'HS256' or 'none'. This is for our auth microservice MVP that prioritizes speed.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Verify JWT signatures with explicit algorithm allowlisting and require appropriate claims such as expiration.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Require signature verification and explicitly allow only expected algorithms.
- Require expiration and validate issuer/audience when appropriate.
- Use strong keys from secure configuration, not hardcoded secrets.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not decode tokens without verifying the signature.
- Do not accept whatever algorithm appears in the token header without an allowlist.
- Do not issue long-lived tokens with no expiration.
# Category: insecure_jwt

import jwt from 'jsonwebtoken';
import { randomBytes } from 'crypto';

interface AuthConfig {
  jwtSecret: string;
  algorithm: jwt.Algorithm;
  tokenExpiration: string;
  issuer: string;
  audience: string;
}

interface TokenPayload {
  userId: string;
  email: string;
  role: string;
}

interface DecodedToken extends TokenPayload {
  iat: number;
  exp: number;
  iss: string;
  aud: string;
}

class AuthenticationService {
  private config: AuthConfig;
  private readonly ALLOWED_ALGORITHMS: jwt.Algorithm[] = ['HS256', 'HS384', 'HS512', 'RS256', 'RS384', 'RS512'];

  constructor(config?: Partial<AuthConfig>) {
    this.config = this.initializeConfig(config);
    this.validateConfig();
  }

  private initializeConfig(config?: Partial<AuthConfig>): AuthConfig {
    const jwtSecret = process.env.JWT_SECRET || this.generateSecureSecret();
    const algorithm = (config?.algorithm || process.env.JWT_ALGORITHM || 'HS256') as jwt.Algorithm;
    
    return {
      jwtSecret,
      algorithm,
      tokenExpiration: config?.tokenExpiration || process.env.JWT_EXPIRATION || '15m',
      issuer: config?.issuer || process.env.JWT_ISSUER || 'auth-service',
      audience: config?.audience || process.env.JWT_AUDIENCE || 'api-service',
    };
  }

  private generateSecureSecret(): string {
    return randomBytes(64).toString('hex');
  }

  private validateConfig(): void {
    if (!this.config.jwtSecret || this.config.jwtSecret.length < 32) {
      throw new Error('JWT secret must be at least 32 characters long');
    }

    if (this.config.jwtSecret === 'secret123') {
      throw new Error('Default development secret detected. Use a strong secret in production');
    }

    if (!this.ALLOWED_ALGORITHMS.includes(this.config.algorithm)) {
      throw new Error(`Algorithm ${this.config.algorithm} is not in the allowlist`);
    }

    if (this.config.algorithm === 'none') {
      throw new Error('Algorithm "none" is not allowed for security reasons');
    }
  }

  public signToken(payload: TokenPayload): string {
    const tokenPayload = {
      ...payload,
      iss: this.config.issuer,
      aud: this.config.audience,
    };

    return jwt.sign(tokenPayload, this.config.jwtSecret, {
      algorithm: this.config.algorithm,
      expiresIn: this.config.tokenExpiration,
    });
  }

  public verifyToken(token: string): DecodedToken {
    try {
      const decoded = jwt.verify(token, this.config.jwtSecret, {
        algorithms: [this.config.algorithm],
        issuer: this.config.issuer,
        audience: this.config.audience,
        complete: false,
      }) as DecodedToken;

      if (!decoded.exp) {
        throw new Error('Token must have an expiration claim');
      }

      return decoded;
    } catch (error) {
      if (error instanceof jwt.TokenExpiredError) {
        throw new Error('Token has expired');
      } else if (error instanceof jwt.JsonWebTokenError) {
        throw new Error('Invalid token signature or format');
      } else if (error instanceof jwt.NotBeforeError) {
        throw new Error('Token not yet valid');
      }
      throw error;
    }
  }

  public refreshToken(token: string): string {
    const decoded = this.verifyToken(token);
    
    const newPayload: TokenPayload = {
      userId: decoded.userId,
      email: decoded.email,
      role: decoded.role,
    };

    return this.signToken(newPayload);
  }

  public decodeTokenUnsafe(token: string): any {
    throw new Error('Unsafe token decoding is not allowed. Use verifyToken() instead');
  }
}

export { AuthenticationService, AuthConfig, TokenPayload, DecodedToken };
